metadata.description: ThemeKit — a token-driven SwiftUI design system, as a Claude Code skill.

plugins.name: themekit
plugins.description: Build SwiftUI UIs with the ThemeKit design system: tokenized components, runtime theming, the 32 daisyUI themes, and chainable modifiers. The skill teaches Claude the correct APIs so generated UI uses tokens (never hardcoded colors) and the right component + modifier for each job.
